purpose: Pilot experiments for iteration 3: validate Fast-dLLM and JoT integration, establish canonical baseline, gate decisions for full-scale experiments

pilots.name: Canonical Baseline TPS
pilots.pass_criteria: TPS measurement consistent across last 150 samples (CV < 10%) AND batch=1,4,8 all produce valid measurements
pilots.gate_description: All downstream speedup calculations reference this baseline. Must complete before any other experiment.

pilots.name: Fast-dLLM Integration Pilot
pilots.pass_criteria: Fast-dLLM loads on LLaDA-8B AND at least one config achieves TPS > 2x canonical baseline
pilots.gate_description: Determines whether Fast-dLLM replaces M1. If fails: (a) try EntropyCache unified benchmark, (b) if that fails, proceed with 3-method study {IGSD, M3, JoT}.
pilots.fallback: Use EntropyCache unified benchmark code OR proceed without proper KV cache axis

pilots.name: JoT Integration Pilot
pilots.pass_criteria: JoT produces valid outputs on LLaDA-8B AND at least one threshold achieves speedup > 2x at AccRet > 90%
pilots.gate_description: Determines whether JoT enters the composition study. If repo fails, re-implement core logic (50 lines).
pilots.fallback: Re-implement JoT core logic: per-position confidence tracking, early commit when confidence > threshold for N consecutive steps

pilots.name: Fast-dLLM + JoT Composition Pilot
pilots.pass_criteria: Combined method produces valid outputs AND combined TPS > max(individual TPS) AND Ortho > 0.5
pilots.gate_description: Quick check of the headline composition before committing to full-scale 6-pair matrix.

decision_protocol.all_gates_pass: Proceed with full 4-method, 6-pair composition study as planned
decision_protocol.fastdllm_fails: Proceed with 3-method study {IGSD, M3, JoT}. Report M1/KV-cache as engineering gap. 3 pairwise compositions instead of 6.
decision_protocol.jot_fails: Proceed with 3-method study {Fast-dLLM, IGSD, M3}. Same as iter_002 but with proper Fast-dLLM. 3 pairwise compositions.
decision_protocol.both_fail: Focus on full-scale replication of iter_002 3-pair study with honest reframing. Major scope reduction.
decision_protocol.baseline_fails: Debug LLaDA-8B loading. This should not fail given iter_001/002 success.
